calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing And Application For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos,Proceedings reported by: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone # 415 551 3775 (514)

Krista J. Dunzweiler, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ROBERT DEVINE, JOHANNES PETERSEN, ALON FRIEDLANDER AND RONALD BAUER.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROBERT FOOW LEE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered declarations submitted anf filed in support of request for entry of Default prove up admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages in favor of Johannes Petersen in the amount of $34,981.34
Damages in favor of Robet Devine in the amount of $46,641.79
Damages in favor of Alon Friedlander in the amount of $146,921.64
Damages in favor of Rolad Bauer in the amount of $146,921.64
and costs in the amount of $1,206.00 for a total Judgment amount of $376,672.41. Plaintiffs are entitled to post-judgment interest that accrues from the date of the entry of judgment at the legal rate of 10% per annum.
Judgment signed in open court.
